name: HTTP Marker Importer
description: First-party example HTTP plugin that imports intro and credits markers through the controlled marker Host API.

permissions.reason: Read public item metadata and external IDs before resolving marker candidates.
Replace this plugin's own marker source for matched media items.

configSchema.label: Marker source
configSchema.helpText: Optional source suffix stored as plugin:{pluginId}:{source}.

configSchema.label: Marker source URL
configSchema.helpText: Optional HTTP endpoint returning marker candidates for provider/externalId.

configSchema.label: Minimum confidence
configSchema.helpText: Optional 0-1 threshold applied before writing markers.

configSchema.label: Clear when missing
configSchema.helpText: When true, clear this plugin source if no marker candidates are found.
